sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112475" key="fugode/mnios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῠγο-δέμνιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n112475.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shunning the marriage-bed,</tr_> of Pallas, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.10</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
